mapper.select: SELECT rr.*, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.avatar_url AS user_avatar, CASE WHEN lk.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked FROM review_replies rr LEFT JOIN users u ON rr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN likes lk ON lk.target_type = 'REVIEW_REPLY' AND lk.target_id = rr.id AND lk.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE rr.review_id = #{reviewId} AND rr.deleted_at IS NULL AND rr.status = 'NORMAL' AND rr.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY rr.created_at ASC

SELECT rr.*, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.avatar_url AS user_avatar, CASE WHEN lk.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked FROM review_replies rr LEFT JOIN users u ON rr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN likes lk ON lk.target_type = 'REVIEW_REPLY' AND lk.target_id = rr.id AND lk.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE rr.parent_id = #{parentId} AND rr.deleted_at IS NULL AND rr.status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY rr.created_at ASC
